steps.title: Use the example
steps.content: The example says people can wash footwear after travel to avoid introducing invasive organisms. The blank should describe a problem that human action can stop.

steps.title: Compare the words
steps.content: Choice B means certain; Choice C means frequent; Choice D means worrying. Choice A, preventable, matches the idea that simple steps can stop biodiversity loss from invasive species. The answer is A.
